version.description: Semantic content version for this mode profile set, e.g., 1.0.0.

mapid.description: Stable identifier for the map this profile applies to, e.g., beachdead, thebloodcount.

schemaversion.description: Schema version string for compatibility checks, e.g., modeprofilesv1.0.0.

modes.description: List of mode profiles that filter zones, spawns, objectives, hazards, and lighting.

id.description: Internal mode identifier, e.g., BeachFrenchiesDay, TotalWarValley.

enabledzones.description: Zone tags that should be considered active for this mode.

enabledspawnroletags.description: Spawn roletags that are allowed to be instantiated in this mode.

enabledobjectiveroletags.description: Objective roletags that are active in this mode.

enabledhazardroletags.description: Hazard roletags that are active in this mode.

lightingprofile.description: Logical lighting / post-process profile ID to apply per engine.

notes.description: Optional free-form designer notes about this mode.
